MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Susan Lee. Arnold Evje, Esq. represented City Housing Inc. Also present, Property Manager, Sean Hughes. Ted Janoswky, Esq. The case settled per written stipulation of parties per the record. Trial date is vacated.
